features: Arm & Hammer Extra White Toothpaste - Pack of 3
description: Product description Arm & Hammer Extra White is perfect for those of you who like to keep your teeth in top condition but enjoy the added benefit of a beautiful, sparkling white smile. Arm & Hammer Extra White contains high amounts of baking soda for a highly effective yet very gentle cleaning process. Ingredients Sodium Bicarbonate (Baking Soda), Aqua, Glycerin, PEG-8, Sodium Saccarin, Aroma, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Lauryl Sulphate, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, Limonene, CI 77947 Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush. Brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, focusing on all surfaces. Rinse with water. Safety Warning For external use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. If irritated, discontinue use and consult the dentist. See more
